network_policies.name: network-policy
issues: policyTypes does not include Egress (all egress traffic is allowed)

webhooks.name: vogxserver.kb.io
webhooks.purpose: Validating webhook for OGXServer custom resources on create and update. It enforces that the distribution name is known, provider IDs are unique, model resource provider references point to configured providers, and adoption annotations do not equal the CR name (which would cause Deployment name conflicts).

ingress_routing.name: rbac-inferred
ingress_routing.note: component has RBAC permissions for this resource type but no static manifests found

issues: GOMEMLIMIT ratio 78.1% is below recommended 80% minimum (GC cannot pressure-tune effectively)
Type OGXServer is watched but has no cache filter (cluster-wide informer)

api_types.name: ServerSpec
api_types.doc: ServerSpec defines the desired state of llama server.

fields.name: Workers
fields.doc: Workers configures the number of uvicorn worker processes to run. When set, the operator will launch llama-stack using uvicorn with the specified worker count. Ref: https://fastapi.tiangolo.com/deployment/server-workers/ CPU requests are set to the number of workers when set, otherwise 1 full core

fields.name: PodOverrides
fields.doc: Optional pod-level overrides

fields.name: PodDisruptionBudget
fields.doc: PodDisruptionBudget controls voluntary disruption tolerance for the server pods

fields.name: TopologySpreadConstraints
fields.doc: TopologySpreadConstraints defines fine-grained spreading rules

fields.name: Autoscaling
fields.doc: Autoscaling configures HorizontalPodAutoscaler for the server pods

fields.name: Storage
fields.doc: Storage defines the persistent storage configuration

fields.name: UserConfig
fields.doc: UserConfig defines the user configuration for the llama-stack server

fields.name: TLSConfig
fields.doc: TLSConfig defines the TLS configuration for the llama-stack server

fields.name: ConfigMapName
fields.doc: ConfigMapName is the name of the ConfigMap containing user configuration

fields.name: ConfigMapNamespace
fields.doc: ConfigMapNamespace is the namespace of the ConfigMap (defaults to the same namespace as the CR)

api_types.name: TLSConfig
api_types.doc: TLSConfig defines the TLS configuration for the llama-stack server

fields.name: CABundle
fields.doc: CABundle defines the CA bundle configuration for custom certificates

api_types.name: CABundleConfig
api_types.doc: CABundleConfig defines the CA bundle configuration for custom certificates

fields.name: ConfigMapName
fields.doc: ConfigMapName is the name of the ConfigMap containing CA bundle certificates

fields.name: ConfigMapNamespace
fields.doc: ConfigMapNamespace is the namespace of the ConfigMap (defaults to the same namespace as the CR)

fields.name: ConfigMapKeys
fields.doc: ConfigMapKeys specifies multiple keys within the ConfigMap containing CA bundle data All certificates from these keys will be concatenated into a single CA bundle file If not specified, defaults to [DefaultCABundleKey]

api_types.name: StorageSpec
api_types.doc: StorageSpec defines the persistent storage configuration

fields.name: Size
fields.doc: Size is the size of the persistent volume claim created for holding persistent data of the llama-stack server

fields.name: MountPath
fields.doc: MountPath is the path where the storage will be mounted in the container

api_types.name: ContainerSpec
api_types.doc: ContainerSpec defines the llama-stack server container configuration.

fields.name: Name
fields.doc: Optional, defaults to "llama-stack"

fields.name: Port
fields.doc: Defaults to 8321 if unset

fields.name: Env
fields.doc: Runtime env vars (e.g., INFERENCE_MODEL)

api_types.name: PodOverrides
api_types.doc: PodOverrides allows advanced pod-level customization.

fields.name: ServiceAccountName
fields.doc: ServiceAccountName allows users to specify their own ServiceAccount If not specified, the operator will use the default ServiceAccount

fields.name: TerminationGracePeriodSeconds
fields.doc: TerminationGracePeriodSeconds is the time allowed for graceful pod shutdown. If not specified, Kubernetes defaults to 30 seconds.

api_types.name: PodDisruptionBudgetSpec
api_types.doc: PodDisruptionBudgetSpec defines voluntary disruption controls.

fields.name: MinAvailable
fields.doc: MinAvailable is the minimum number of pods that must remain available

fields.name: MaxUnavailable
fields.doc: MaxUnavailable is the maximum number of pods that can be disrupted simultaneously

api_types.name: AutoscalingSpec
api_types.doc: AutoscalingSpec configures HorizontalPodAutoscaler targets.

fields.name: MinReplicas
fields.doc: MinReplicas is the lower bound replica count maintained by the HPA

fields.name: MaxReplicas
fields.doc: MaxReplicas is the upper bound replica count maintained by the HPA

fields.name: TargetCPUUtilizationPercentage
fields.doc: TargetCPUUtilizationPercentage configures CPU based scaling

fields.name: TargetMemoryUtilizationPercentage
fields.doc: TargetMemoryUtilizationPercentage configures memory based scaling

api_types.name: ProviderInfo
api_types.doc: ProviderInfo represents a single provider from the providers endpoint.

api_types.name: DistributionConfig
api_types.doc: DistributionConfig represents the configuration information from the providers endpoint.

fields.name: ActiveDistribution
fields.doc: ActiveDistribution shows which distribution is currently being used

fields.name: AvailableDistributions
fields.doc: AvailableDistributions lists all available distributions and their images

api_types.name: VersionInfo
api_types.doc: VersionInfo contains version-related information

fields.name: OperatorVersion
fields.doc: OperatorVersion is the version of the operator managing this distribution

fields.name: LlamaStackServerVersion
fields.doc: LlamaStackServerVersion is the version of the LlamaStack server

fields.name: LastUpdated
fields.doc: LastUpdated represents when the version information was last updated

api_types.name: LlamaStackDistributionStatus
api_types.doc: LlamaStackDistributionStatus defines the observed state of LlamaStackDistribution.

fields.name: Phase
fields.doc: Phase represents the current phase of the distribution

fields.name: Version
fields.doc: Version contains version information for both operator and deployment

fields.name: DistributionConfig
fields.doc: DistributionConfig contains the configuration information from the providers endpoint

fields.name: Conditions
fields.doc: Conditions represent the latest available observations of the distribution's current state

fields.name: AvailableReplicas
fields.doc: AvailableReplicas is the number of available replicas

fields.name: ServiceURL
fields.doc: ServiceURL is the internal Kubernetes service URL where the distribution is exposed

fields.name: RouteURL
fields.doc: RouteURL is the external URL where the distribution is exposed (when exposeRoute is true). nil when external access is not configured, empty string when Ingress exists but URL not ready.

api_types.name: LlamaStackDistributionList
api_types.doc: LlamaStackDistributionList contains a list of LlamaStackDistribution.

api_types.name: DistributionType
api_types.doc: DistributionType defines the distribution configuration for llama-stack.

fields.name: Name
fields.doc: Name is the distribution name that maps to supported distributions.

fields.name: Image
fields.doc: Image is the direct container image reference to use

markers: +kubebuilder:validation:XValidation:rule="!(has(self.name) && has(self.image))",message="Only one of name or image can be specified"

api_types.name: ProviderHealthStatus
api_types.doc: HealthStatus represents the health status of a provider

api_types.name: LlamaStackDistributionSpec
api_types.doc: LlamaStackDistributionSpec defines the desired state of LlamaStackDistribution.

fields.name: Network
fields.doc: Network defines network access controls for the LlamaStack service

api_types.name: NetworkSpec
api_types.doc: NetworkSpec defines network access controls for the LlamaStack service.

fields.name: ExposeRoute
fields.doc: ExposeRoute when true, creates an Ingress for external access. Default is false (internal access only).

fields.name: AllowedFrom
fields.doc: AllowedFrom defines which namespaces are allowed to access the LlamaStack service. By default, only the LLSD namespace and the operator namespace are allowed.

api_types.name: AllowedFromSpec
api_types.doc: AllowedFromSpec defines namespace-based access controls for NetworkPolicies.

fields.name: Namespaces
fields.doc: Namespaces is an explicit list of namespace names allowed to access the service. Use "*" to allow all namespaces.

fields.name: Labels
fields.doc: Labels is a list of namespace label keys that are allowed to access the service. A namespace matching any of these labels will be granted access (OR semantics). Example: ["myproject/lls-allowed", "team/authorized"]

api_types.name: ConfigMapKeyRef
api_types.doc: ConfigMapKeyRef references a key within a ConfigMap. The ConfigMap must be in the same namespace as the OGXServer and must have the label ogx.io/watch: "true" to be detected by the operator's cache.

fields.name: Name
fields.doc: Name is the name of the ConfigMap.

fields.name: Key
fields.doc: Key is the key within the ConfigMap.

api_types.name: ModelConfig
api_types.doc: ModelConfig defines a model registration with optional provider assignment and metadata.

fields.name: Name
fields.doc: Name is the model identifier (e.g., "llama3.2-8b").

fields.name: Provider
fields.doc: Provider is the ID of the provider to register this model with. Defaults to the first inference provider when omitted.

fields.name: ContextLength
fields.doc: ContextLength is the model context window size.

fields.name: ModelType
fields.doc: ModelType is the model type classification.

fields.name: Quantization
fields.doc: Quantization is the quantization method.

markers: +kubebuilder:validation:XValidation:rule="!has(self.provider) || self.provider.size() > 0",message="provider must not be empty if specified"
+kubebuilder:validation:XValidation:rule="!has(self.modelType) || self.modelType.size() > 0",message="modelType must not be empty if specified"
+kubebuilder:validation:XValidation:rule="!has(self.quantization) || self.quantization.size() > 0",message="quantization must not be empty if specified"

api_types.name: ResourcesSpec
api_types.doc: ResourcesSpec defines declarative registration of models, tools, and shields.

fields.name: Models
fields.doc: Models to register with inference providers.

fields.name: Tools
fields.doc: Tools are tool group names to register with the toolRuntime provider.

fields.name: Shields
fields.doc: Shields to register by name.

api_types.name: KVStorageSpec
api_types.doc: KVStorageSpec configures the key-value storage backend.

fields.name: Type
fields.doc: Type is the KV storage backend type.

fields.name: Endpoint
fields.doc: Endpoint is the Redis endpoint URL. Required when type is "redis".

fields.name: Password
fields.doc: Password references a Secret for Redis authentication. The Secret must be in the same namespace as the OGXServer and must have the label ogx.io/watch: "true".

markers: +kubebuilder:validation:XValidation:rule="self.type != 'redis' || has(self.endpoint)",message="endpoint is required when type is redis"
+kubebuilder:validation:XValidation:rule="!has(self.endpoint) || self.type == 'redis'",message="endpoint is only valid when type is redis"
+kubebuilder:validation:XValidation:rule="!has(self.password) || self.type == 'redis'",message="password is only valid when type is redis"

api_types.name: SQLStorageSpec
api_types.doc: SQLStorageSpec configures the relational storage backend.

fields.name: Type
fields.doc: Type is the SQL storage backend type.

fields.name: ConnectionString
fields.doc: ConnectionString references a Secret containing the database connection string. Required when type is "postgres". The Secret must be in the same namespace as the OGXServer and must have the label ogx.io/watch: "true".

markers: +kubebuilder:validation:XValidation:rule="self.type != 'postgres' || has(self.connectionString)",message="connectionString is required when type is postgres"
+kubebuilder:validation:XValidation:rule="!has(self.connectionString) || self.type == 'postgres'",message="connectionString is only valid when type is postgres"

api_types.name: StateStorageSpec
api_types.doc: StateStorageSpec groups key-value and SQL storage backends.

fields.name: KV
fields.doc: KV configures key-value storage.

fields.name: SQL
fields.doc: SQL configures SQL storage.

api_types.name: TLSSpec
api_types.doc: TLSSpec defines TLS termination configuration for the server.

fields.name: SecretName
fields.doc: SecretName references a Kubernetes TLS Secret containing a valid TLS certificate for server TLS termination. The Secret must be in the same namespace as the OGXServer and must have the label ogx.io/watch: "true" to be detected by the operator's cache.

api_types.name: TrustConfig
api_types.doc: TrustConfig configures trust anchors for verifying outbound TLS connections.

fields.name: CACertificates
fields.doc: CACertificates lists ConfigMap keys containing PEM-encoded CA certificates. All certificates are concatenated into a single trust bundle. Referenced ConfigMaps must be in the same namespace as the OGXServer and must have the label ogx.io/watch: "true".

api_types.name: IdentityConfig
api_types.doc: IdentityConfig configures client certificate identity for mTLS authentication.

fields.name: Cert
fields.doc: Cert references a ConfigMap key containing the PEM-encoded TLS client certificate. The ConfigMap must be in the same namespace as the OGXServer and must have the label ogx.io/watch: "true".

fields.name: Key
fields.doc: Key references a Secret key containing the PEM-encoded TLS client private key. The Secret must be in the same namespace as the OGXServer and must have the label ogx.io/watch: "true".

api_types.name: TLSClientConfig
api_types.doc: TLSClientConfig groups outbound TLS settings: trust anchors and client identity.

fields.name: Trust
fields.doc: Trust configures CA certificates for verifying outbound TLS connections to providers and backends.

fields.name: Identity
fields.doc: Identity configures client certificate and key for mTLS authentication with providers and backends.

api_types.name: NetworkPolicySpec
api_types.doc: NetworkPolicySpec configures the operator-managed NetworkPolicy for this server. Ingress is always enforced unless explicitly omitted from policyTypes. The operator always includes default ingress rules (allow from same-namespace and operator-namespace on the service port), merging them with any user-specified rules. Egress is unrestricted by default. It is only enforced when egress rules are provided or "Egress" is explicitly included in policyTypes. When any egress rules are configured, or when "Egress" is explicitly included in policyTypes, a kube-dns egress rule is auto-injected to prevent DNS breakage.

fields.name: Enabled
fields.doc: Enabled controls whether the operator manages a NetworkPolicy for this server. Defaults to true. Set to false to disable NetworkPolicy creation entirely.

fields.name: PolicyTypes
fields.doc: PolicyTypes specifies which policy directions are enforced. Follows Kubernetes NetworkPolicy semantics: when omitted or empty, Ingress is always included and Egress is included only if egress rules are provided.

fields.name: Ingress
fields.doc: Ingress defines additional ingress rules, merged with operator defaults (allow from same-namespace and operator-namespace on the service port).

fields.name: Egress
fields.doc: Egress rules. When non-empty, a kube-dns egress rule is auto-injected to prevent DNS breakage.

api_types.name: ExternalAccessConfig
api_types.doc: ExternalAccessConfig controls external service exposure.

fields.name: Enabled
fields.doc: Enabled controls whether external access is created.

fields.name: Hostname
fields.doc: Hostname sets a custom hostname for the external endpoint. When omitted, an auto-generated hostname is used.

markers: +kubebuilder:validation:XValidation:rule="!has(self.hostname) || self.hostname.size() > 0",message="hostname must not be empty if specified"

api_types.name: NetworkSpec
api_types.doc: NetworkSpec defines network access controls for the OGXServer.

fields.name: Port
fields.doc: Port is the server listen port.

fields.name: TLS
fields.doc: TLS configures optional TLS termination for the server. When omitted, the server listens over plain HTTP.

fields.name: ExternalAccess
fields.doc: ExternalAccess controls external service exposure.

fields.name: Policy
fields.doc: Policy configures the operator-managed NetworkPolicy. When nil, the operator creates a default NetworkPolicy with safe ingress rules.

api_types.name: PVCStorageSpec
api_types.doc: PVCStorageSpec defines PVC storage for persistent data.

fields.name: Size
fields.doc: Size is the size of the PVC.

fields.name: MountPath
fields.doc: MountPath is the container mount path for the PVC.

markers: +kubebuilder:validation:XValidation:rule="!has(self.mountPath) || self.mountPath.size() > 0",message="mountPath must not be empty if specified"

api_types.name: PodDisruptionBudgetSpec
api_types.doc: PodDisruptionBudgetSpec defines voluntary disruption controls.

fields.name: MinAvailable
fields.doc: MinAvailable is the minimum number of pods that must remain available.

fields.name: MaxUnavailable
fields.doc: MaxUnavailable is the maximum number of pods that can be disrupted simultaneously.

markers: +kubebuilder:validation:XValidation:rule="has(self.minAvailable) || has(self.maxUnavailable)",message="at least one of minAvailable or maxUnavailable must be specified"

api_types.name: AutoscalingSpec
api_types.doc: AutoscalingSpec configures HorizontalPodAutoscaler targets.

fields.name: MinReplicas
fields.doc: MinReplicas is the lower bound replica count.

fields.name: MaxReplicas
fields.doc: MaxReplicas is the upper bound replica count.

fields.name: TargetCPUUtilizationPercentage
fields.doc: TargetCPUUtilizationPercentage configures CPU-based scaling.

fields.name: TargetMemoryUtilizationPercentage
fields.doc: TargetMemoryUtilizationPercentage configures memory-based scaling.

markers: +kubebuilder:validation:XValidation:rule="!has(self.minReplicas) || self.maxReplicas >= self.minReplicas",message="maxReplicas must be greater than or equal to minReplicas"

api_types.name: WorkloadOverrides
api_types.doc: WorkloadOverrides allows low-level customization of the Pod template.

fields.name: ServiceAccountName
fields.doc: ServiceAccountName specifies a custom ServiceAccount.

fields.name: Env
fields.doc: Env specifies additional environment variables.

fields.name: Command
fields.doc: Command overrides the container command.

fields.name: Args
fields.doc: Args overrides the container arguments.

fields.name: Volumes
fields.doc: Volumes adds additional volumes to the Pod.

fields.name: VolumeMounts
fields.doc: VolumeMounts adds additional volume mounts to the container.

markers: +kubebuilder:validation:XValidation:rule="!has(self.serviceAccountName) || self.serviceAccountName.size() > 0",message="serviceAccountName must not be empty if specified"

api_types.name: WorkloadSpec
api_types.doc: WorkloadSpec consolidates Kubernetes deployment settings.

fields.name: Replicas
fields.doc: Replicas is the desired Pod replica count.

fields.name: Workers
fields.doc: Workers configures the number of uvicorn worker processes.

fields.name: Resources
fields.doc: Resources defines CPU/memory requests and limits.

fields.name: Autoscaling
fields.doc: Autoscaling configures HPA for the server pods.

fields.name: Storage
fields.doc: Storage defines PVC configuration.

fields.name: PodDisruptionBudget
fields.doc: PodDisruptionBudget controls voluntary disruption tolerance.

fields.name: TopologySpreadConstraints
fields.doc: TopologySpreadConstraints defines Pod spreading rules.

fields.name: Overrides
fields.doc: Overrides allows pod-level customization.

api_types.name: OGXServerSpec
api_types.doc: OGXServerSpec defines the desired state of OGXServer. nolint:lll // kubebuilder markers cannot be split across lines.

fields.name: Distribution
fields.doc: Distribution identifies the OGX distribution to deploy.

fields.name: Providers
fields.doc: Providers configures providers by API type. Mutually exclusive with overrideConfig.

fields.name: Resources
fields.doc: Resources declares models, tools, and shields to register. Mutually exclusive with overrideConfig.

fields.name: Storage
fields.doc: Storage configures state storage backends (KV and SQL). Mutually exclusive with overrideConfig.

fields.name: DisabledAPIs
fields.doc: DisabledAPIs lists API names to remove from the generated config. Mutually exclusive with overrideConfig.

fields.name: Network
fields.doc: Network defines network access controls.

fields.name: TLS
fields.doc: TLS configures outbound TLS trust anchors and client identity for connections to providers and backends.

fields.name: Workload
fields.doc: Workload consolidates Kubernetes deployment settings.

fields.name: OverrideConfig
fields.doc: OverrideConfig references a ConfigMap key containing a full config.yaml override. Mutually exclusive with providers, resources, storage, and disabledAPIs. The ConfigMap must be in the same namespace as the OGXServer and must have the label ogx.io/watch: "true".

markers: +kubebuilder:validation:XValidation:rule="!has(self.providers) || !has(self.disabledAPIs) || !self.disabledAPIs.exists(d, d == 'inference') || !has(self.providers.inference)",message="inference cannot be both in providers and disabledAPIs"

+kubebuilder:validation:XValidation:rule="!has(self.providers) || !has(self.disabledAPIs) || !self.disabledAPIs.exists(d, d == 'vector_io') || !has(self.providers.vectorIo)",message="vector_io cannot be both in providers and disabledAPIs"

+kubebuilder:validation:XValidation:rule="!has(self.providers) || !has(self.disabledAPIs) || !self.disabledAPIs.exists(d, d == 'tool_runtime') || !has(self.providers.toolRuntime)",message="tool_runtime cannot be both in providers and disabledAPIs"

+kubebuilder:validation:XValidation:rule="!has(self.providers) || !has(self.disabledAPIs) || !self.disabledAPIs.exists(d, d == 'files') || !has(self.providers.files)",message="files cannot be both in providers and disabledAPIs"

+kubebuilder:validation:XValidation:rule="!has(self.providers) || !has(self.disabledAPIs) || !self.disabledAPIs.exists(d, d == 'batches') || !has(self.providers.batches)",message="batches cannot be both in providers and disabledAPIs"

+kubebuilder:validation:XValidation:rule="!has(self.providers) || !has(self.disabledAPIs) || !self.disabledAPIs.exists(d, d == 'responses') || !has(self.providers.responses)",message="responses cannot be both in providers and disabledAPIs"

api_types.name: ProviderHealthStatus
api_types.doc: ProviderHealthStatus represents the health status of a provider.

api_types.name: ProviderInfo
api_types.doc: ProviderInfo represents a single provider from the providers endpoint.

api_types.name: DistributionConfig
api_types.doc: DistributionConfig represents the configuration from the providers endpoint.

api_types.name: VersionInfo
api_types.doc: VersionInfo contains version-related information.

api_types.doc: ResolvedDistributionStatus tracks the resolved distribution image for change detection.

fields.name: Image
fields.doc: Image is the resolved container image reference (with digest when available).

fields.name: ConfigSource
fields.doc: ConfigSource indicates the config origin: "embedded" or "oci-label".

fields.name: ConfigHash
fields.doc: ConfigHash is the SHA256 hash of the base config used.

api_types.name: ConfigGenerationStatus
api_types.doc: ConfigGenerationStatus tracks config generation details.

fields.name: ObservedGeneration

fields.name: ConfigMapName
fields.doc: ConfigMapName is the name of the generated ConfigMap.

fields.name: GeneratedAt

fields.name: ProviderCount
fields.doc: ProviderCount is the number of configured providers.

fields.name: ResourceCount
fields.doc: ResourceCount is the number of registered resources.

fields.name: ConfigVersion
fields.doc: ConfigVersion is the config.yaml schema version.

api_types.name: OGXServerStatus
api_types.doc: OGXServerStatus defines the observed state of OGXServer.

fields.name: Phase
fields.doc: Phase represents the current phase of the server.

fields.name: Version
fields.doc: Version contains version information for both operator and server.

fields.name: DistributionConfig
fields.doc: DistributionConfig contains provider information from the running server.

fields.name: ResolvedDistribution
fields.doc: ResolvedDistribution tracks the resolved image and config source.

fields.name: ConfigGeneration
fields.doc: ConfigGeneration tracks config generation details.

fields.name: Conditions
fields.doc: Conditions represent the latest available observations of the server's state.

fields.name: AvailableReplicas
fields.doc: AvailableReplicas is the number of available replicas.

fields.name: ServiceURL
fields.doc: ServiceURL is the internal Kubernetes service URL.

fields.name: ExternalURL
fields.doc: ExternalURL is the external URL when external access is configured.

api_types.name: OGXServer
api_types.doc: OGXServer is the Schema for the ogxservers API.

api_types.name: OGXServerList
api_types.doc: OGXServerList contains a list of OGXServer.

api_types.name: DistributionSpec
api_types.doc: DistributionSpec identifies the OGX distribution image to deploy. Exactly one of name or image must be specified.

fields.name: Name
fields.doc: Name is the distribution name that maps to a supported distribution (e.g., "starter", "remote-vllm"). Resolved to a container image via distributions.json and image-overrides.

fields.name: Image
fields.doc: Image is a direct container image reference to use.

markers: +kubebuilder:validation:XValidation:rule="!(has(self.name) && has(self.image))",message="only one of name or image can be specified"
+kubebuilder:validation:XValidation:rule="has(self.name) || has(self.image)",message="one of name or image must be specified"

api_types.name: SecretKeyRef
api_types.doc: SecretKeyRef references a specific key in a Kubernetes Secret. The Secret must be in the same namespace as the OGXServer and must have the label ogx.io/watch: "true" to be detected by the operator's cache.

fields.name: Name
fields.doc: Name is the name of the Kubernetes Secret.

fields.name: Key
fields.doc: Key is the key within the Secret.

api_types.name: RoutedProviderBase
api_types.doc: RoutedProviderBase contains fields common to all routed (non-singleton) provider instances.

fields.name: ID
fields.doc: ID is a unique provider identifier. Derived from the provider type when omitted. Must be unique across all providers.

markers: +kubebuilder:validation:XValidation:rule="!has(self.id) || self.id.size() > 0",message="id must not be empty if specified"

api_types.name: CustomProvider
api_types.doc: CustomProvider defines the configuration for a custom provider instance. nolint:lll // CEL validation rule

fields.name: Type
fields.doc: Type is the provider type, specified with a "remote::" or "inline::" prefix (e.g., "remote::llama-guard", "inline::my-provider").

fields.name: SecretRefs
fields.doc: SecretRefs is a map of named secret references for provider-specific connection fields (e.g., host, password). Each key becomes the env var field suffix and maps to config.<key> with env var substitution. Each Secret must be in the same namespace as the OGXServer and must have the label ogx.io/watch: "true".

fields.name: Settings
fields.doc: Settings contains provider-specific configuration merged into the provider's config section in config.yaml. Passed through as-is without any secret resolution. Use secretRefs for secret values.

api_types.name: ProvidersSpec
api_types.doc: ProvidersSpec configures providers by API type.

operator_config.name: IngressNameSuffix
operator_config.doc: IngressNameSuffix is the suffix for the Ingress name.

operator_config.name: MaxCABundleSize
operator_config.doc: Security limits for CA bundle processing.

operator_config.name: WatchLabelKey
operator_config.doc:
WatchLabelKey is the label key used to include ConfigMaps in the operator's cache.
Operator-managed ConfigMaps get this label automatically. Users can add it to
their ConfigMaps for instant reconciliation on change.

operator_config.name: WatchLabelValue
operator_config.doc: WatchLabelValue is the expected value for the watch label.

operator_config.name: odhTrustedCABundleConfigMap
operator_config.doc: ODH/RHOAI well-known ConfigMap for trusted CA bundles.

operator_config.name: FSGroup
operator_config.doc:
FSGroup is the filesystem group ID for the pod.
This is the default group ID for the ogx server.

operator_config.name: defaultHPACPUUtilization
operator_config.doc: defaultHPACPUUtilization defines the fallback HPA CPU target percentage.

operator_config.name: instanceLabelKey
operator_config.doc: instanceLabelKey is the label we apply to all resources for per-instance targeting.

operator_config.name: startupScript
operator_config.doc: startupScript is the script that will be used to start the server.

operator_config.name: MessageDeploymentPending
operator_config.doc: MessageDeploymentPending indicates the deployment is pending.

operator_config.name: MessageHealthCheckFailed
operator_config.doc: MessageHealthCheckFailed indicates the health check failed.

operator_config.name: MessageHealthCheckPassed
operator_config.doc: MessageHealthCheckPassed indicates the health check passed.

summary: ogx-k8s-operator is a Kubernetes component. managing 2 CRD(s): LlamaStackDistribution, OGXServer. deploying 2 workload(s) (deployment, ogx-k8s-operator-controller-manager) with 1 container(s). watching 9 resource type(s). exposing 2 service(s). with 1 webhook(s) (1 validating). protected by 1 network policy/policies. with 2 PodDisruptionBudget(s). with 1 HorizontalPodAutoscaler(s). defining 23 API spec type(s) across 53 struct(s) with 187 total fields. with 31 operator config constants. reporting 11 status condition types. with 1 ingress route(s).
